##### BRICKELL

Meliá Residences Miami features 110 units, including studios, junior suites, and one-bedroom layouts. Owners will have the opportunity to maximize their returns by participating in a professionally managed hotel program.

These fully furnished and decorated unit features an open-concept design that seamlessly combines the living and dining areas with a fully equipped kitchen, ideal for modern living.

Hospitality, Redefined

Experience

Driven Living with

Meliá Hotels & resorts

Meliá Hotels & Resorts, the cornerstone brand of Meliá Hotels International, proudly operates in over 30 countries, embodying the essence of warm Spanish hospitality paired with exceptional service. Each property is thoughtfully crafted to forge authentic connections with guests, seamlessly blending sophisticated comfort, elegant style, and meticulous attention to detail. From serene, inviting spaces to personalized, attentive services, Meliá Hotels & Resorts is dedicated to curating unforgettable experiences that nurture both physical and emotional well-being, ensuring every stay is a harmonious blend of relaxation and inspiration.

[View more](https://www.melia.com/en)

# Melia Residences Miami

1136 SW 3rd Ave Miami FL 33130

Developed by Urban Network Capital Group (UNCG) and designed by DTI Architects, Meliá Residences Miami introduces a new level of wellness-focused luxury to Brickell. This branded condo-hotel will rise eight stories and feature 110 fully furnished residences, including studios, junior suites, and one-bedroom layouts. Interior design is by Concepto, known for its contemporary approach to urban living, while T&G Constructors serves as builder. The property will be operated under the Meliá Hotels International brand, marking the Spanish hospitality group’s U.S. debut in branded residences. The project has been registered with the U.S. Green Building Council and is pursuing LEED Silver certification, underscoring its commitment to sustainability.

The residences at Meliá Residences Miami have been thoughtfully designed for turnkey living, combining modern functionality with refined finishes. Each home features Italian kitchen cabinetry, quartz countertops, wood-like ceramic tile flooring, and digital keyless access. Units come fully furnished with 75-inch smart TVs, stylish décor, and open-concept layouts that seamlessly integrate the kitchen, living, and dining spaces. With [floor plans](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/melia-residences-miami/floor-plans "Melia Miami floor plans") ranging from 321 to 540 square feet, these residences offer flexibility for both short-term guests and long-term owners participating in the professionally managed hotel rental program.

Residents and guests will enjoy an impressive suite of wellness-oriented amenities and hotel-style services. The building will feature a wellness center, restaurant and bar with an outdoor terrace, business center, and rooftop panoramic jacuzzi. Advanced fitness equipment and a serenity massage space highlight the property’s focus on holistic wellbeing, enhanced by biohacking-inspired elements such as circadian lighting, grounding mattress pads, and vitamin C shower filters. Additional five-star services include 24-hour concierge, daily housekeeping, room service, valet parking, and shuttle transportation, ensuring a seamless experience from arrival to departure.

Situated at 1136 SW 3rd Avenue in [Brickell](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/brickell-condos "Brickell"), Meliá Residences Miami places residents in the center of Miami’s most dynamic urban district. The property is within walking distance of Brickell City Centre, Mary Brickell Village, and the Brightline and Metrorail stations, providing effortless connectivity across the city. Nearby cultural and entertainment destinations include the Perez Art Museum, Frost Museum of Science, LoanDepot Park, and Kaseya Center. With its prime location, international hotel brand, and health-centered design, Meliá Residences Miami offers an exceptional opportunity to own a branded residence in the heart of one of the world’s fastest-growing luxury markets.
